name: Deli Star Corp.
description: Specializing in fresh, never-frozen protein solutions, delivering extended shelf life and an unmatched food safety record. Through culinary innovation, efficient manufacturing, and a resilient supply chain, Deli Star is trusted to meet the evolving needs of the B2B food industry.

name: Farmer John
description: Farmer John offers a variety of fresh pork products, highlighting their commitment to supplying high-quality meats. Their legacy of enhancing flavor profiles contributes to their popularity in southern California.

name: Porky Products Inc.
description: Porky is a worldwide distributor of pork, along with other meats, and has over 60 years of experience in providing high-quality products and services. They ensure timely delivery to over 1,400 supermarkets on the East Coast.

name: Baldor Specialty Foods Inc.
description: Baldor Specialty Foods offers a selection of pork products, emphasizing their commitment to quality and timely delivery.

name: Farmland Foods
description: Farmland Foods specializes in high-quality pork products, offering a variety of options such as bacon, breakfast sausage, and smoked boneless ham.

name: Fancy Foods Inc.
description: Fancy Foods Inc is a distributor of protein food products, including pork, serving the Retail, Wholesale, and Foodservice sectors in the NY, NJ, and Connecticut markets. The company emphasizes a diverse range of products and customized programs to meet the needs of health-conscious consumers.

name: Harvest Food Distributors
description: Harvest Food Distributors, founded in 1989, focuses on providing independent food companies with access to a wide selection of protein items, including pork. Their strategy emphasizes high fill rates and timely delivery, ensuring customers can easily obtain the pork products they need.

name: Karro Food Group
description: Karro Food Group UK is a leading pork processor committed to high quality and animal welfare, aiming to be the first-choice pork supplier. They offer a diverse range of pork products, including fresh pork, bacon, and sausages, to meet customer demand.

name: Quality Pork Processors Inc
description: Quality Pork Processors is a leading producer of processed pork in the U.S., ensuring high-quality and humanely processed pork products that adhere to USDA standards. Their in-house production and packaging emphasize their commitment to safety and deliciousness in pork processing.

name: Vestey Foods International Ltd
description: Vestey Foods International specializes in the sourcing and distribution of quality pork products, along with a diverse range of other meats and food items. With a global presence in over 70 countries, the company ensures a rich understanding of customer and supplier needs, enhancing their ability to provide high-quality pork and related products.
